chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt. Petition No. D –1098 of 2023. Petitioner: Bahadur Chachar in person. Respondents: P.O Sindh and others. Date of Hearing: 06.12.2023. ORDER YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J- The petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, seeking that he and his co-villagers be declared to be the legal grantees of a village situated in S. Nos.397, 386 & 387 admeasuring (02-00) acres in Deh Hamid Korai, Taluka Mirpur Mathelo, District Ghotki and that the respondents be directed to demarcate such area. Having considered the matter, we are of the view that the subject does not fall with the parameters of Article 199 of the Constitution and does not present a fit case for issuance of writ. As such, the petition stands dismissed in limine leaving the petitioner at liberty to pursue the matter before the concerned authorities, if so desired. JUDGE JUDGE Akber.
